info.title: ISO 15143-3 (AEMP 2.0) Fleet API
info.description:
Retrieves machine fleet data according to the ISO 15143-3 (AEMP 2.0) standard. Responses are XML. The API returns only machines with a telematic state of **active** (visible on the Operations Center map).

**Caching:** Responses are cached on Deere servers for one hour. A polling interval of at least one hour is recommended.

**Paging:** Page size is fixed at 100. Follow the `next` link in the response to retrieve all pages.

**Compression:** You may send `Accept-Encoding: gzip` to receive compressed responses.

OAuth2AuthorizationCode.description: Three-legged OAuth 2.0 (authorization code) for John Deere Precision Tech APIs. Required scopes for `/Fleet` are `eq1` (view equipment) and `offline_access` (refresh token). Discover authorization and token endpoints from the well-known URL.

FleetXml.description: ISO 15143-3 Fleet snapshot document (XML). Contains pagination links (`self`, `next`, `last`, `previous`) and, when organization access is not fully enabled for the client, a `connections` link for the Operations Center organization-selection flow.

ErrorXml.description: Error payload when the API returns an XML or text error body.

get.description:
Retrieve a paginated snapshot of an equipment owner’s fleet. Page size is **100**. If a `connections` link appears in the response, the user must complete organization access for your application (see product documentation).

**Request (sandbox):** `GET https://sandboxaemp.deere.com/Fleet/{pageNumber}`

**Request (live):** `GET https://partneraemp.deere.com/Fleet/{pageNumber}`

**Accept:** `application/xml`

**Optional:** `Accept-Encoding: gzip`

parameters.name: pageNumber
parameters.description: 1-based page index. Use `1` for the first page, then follow `rel=next` links until no `next` link is returned.

200.description: Fleet snapshot page (XML). Includes ISO 15143-3 machine data for active telematics machines and pagination links.

401.description: Unauthorized. Missing, invalid, or expired access token.

403.description: Forbidden. Organization access may not be enabled for this client; complete the connections / organization selection flow.
